leadText: Close Combat (Japanese: インファイト Infight) is a damage-dealing Fighting-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TR53 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM167 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM107 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Close Combat inflicts damage and then lowers the user's Defense stat and Special Defense stat by one stage each. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Close Combat's base power was reduced to 100, and it lowers the user's defensive stats for three turns. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 5 Agile Strong Power 100 80 120 Accuracy 100% 100% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Turns 3 3 3 ? ? ? ? Lowers the user's defensive stats Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Close Combat aggressively tracks targets, unlike most other close-range moves. Should the target move out of Close Combat's attack range after Close Combat begins winding up, the user will "teleport" into range to ensure that damage is dealt (discounting the target being a Ghost -type). Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 120 144 Cooldown 12s Move wind-up time 30 frames Effect duration 15s Additional effect — — — Temporarily lowers the user's defense and special defense stats

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt PBR The user fights the foe in close without guarding itself. It also cuts the user's Defense and Sp. Def. HG SS The user fights the foe up close without guarding itself. It also cuts the user's Defense and Sp. Def. B W B2 W2 The user fights the target up close without guarding itself. It also cuts the user's Defense and Sp. Def. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user fights the target up close without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats. LA The user fights the target up close, inflicting damage without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's defensive stats. S V The user fights the target up close, inflicting damage without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats. ZA The user attacks by abandoning defense and charging in close to targets. This lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats for a short time.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. But it also reduces the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 level. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえるが じぶんの ぼうぎょ とくぼうが １だんかいさがる MD GtI It damages an enemy but it also lowers your Defense and Special Defense. (The stat changes return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.) S MD It damages an enemy but also lowers your Defense and Sp. Def. The stats return to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.
